narrative:
Weston Twp Willow (precinct in Wood County) has 481 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
